title: FAIR Minimal Schema for Scholarly Articles
description: Minimalistic and professional JSON Schema for FAIR principles in an academic repository. Defines structure for article metadata including title, author, date, DOI, JSON-LD path, version, type, and sections for metadata, docs, and src.

metadata.description: Campos esperados dentro de metadata (additional FAIR metadata)

docs.description: Campos esperados dentro de docs (array of documentation paths)

src.description: Campos esperados dentro de src (source files or data paths)
